questions: sob package er details jante chai
gaming er jonno kon plan valo?
50 mbps ar 100 mbps er moddhe difference ki?
answers: ISP Digital e amader bohu rokom package ache! Basic 10 Mbps (500 taka/month) theke shuru kore Ultra 200 Mbps (3000 taka/month) porjonto. Apnar budget ar dorkar onujayi choose korte paren.
Amader popular packages holo: Starter (10 Mbps - 500 tk), Standard (50 Mbps - 1200 tk), Premium (100 Mbps - 2000 tk), ar Ultra (200 Mbps - 3000 tk)। Shob plan e unlimited data pachchhen.

Apni ki gaming, streaming, naki general browsing er jonno internet nite chachen? ISP Digital er shob plan e unlimited data thake ar speed guaranteed thake. Apnar usage onujayi best plan suggest korte pari!
Haan, amader student discount ache! Valid student ID dikhale 20% discount paben jekono plan e. ISP Digital shikkharthider support kore!
ISP Digital er best value plan holo Standard 50 Mbps, masik 1200 taka. Streaming, gaming, work from home shob kichu te smooth experience paben.
Yearly subscription nile 2 mash free paben! Mane 12 masher dam e 14 mash internet. ISP Digital er long-term plan e onek save hoy.
Amader family package e 100 Mbps speed ache 2000 taka te, ar shathe 3 ta device er priority bandwidth dewa hoy. Boro family er jonno perfect!
100 Mbps plan er dam masik 2000 taka, ar 200 Mbps plan holo 3000 taka. Duita te unlimited data ar 24/7 support included ache.
